    base:desc "Lighting system actuator modeled in BIM for physical interaction"
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor

]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols"
]

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuxSensor
    base:desc "Real-time light level data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols"
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols"
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted

]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LuxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuxDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity measurement data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for secure IoT device connectivity and protocol handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state management and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance BIMAuthoringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated deployment and metadata extraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operational conditions in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for energy and comfort scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization and comfort adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting control system for energy and visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance BIMModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated BIM model validation during deployment process"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-directive recommendations for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance ComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-directive recommendations for visual comfort adjustments"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted outcomes for energy and comfort scenarios from simulations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building conditions and metrics"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of BIM model integrity and metadata completeness"
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and ambient light"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model enriched with sensor and actuator metadata for the building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTool, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain, demonstrated through Living Lab case study"
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LuxSensor, HumiditySensor, LightingActuator, BuildingBIMModel, ModularArchitecture
]

    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for scalable twin deployment"
]

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data and control signals processed continuously without specified fixed intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [

]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle phases including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness, addressing semantic drift through model synchronization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange; no specific communication protocols documented in the source text."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperable with external BIM tools and IoT platforms through standardized extension points for seamless data exchange."
]

    base:desc "BIM as the primary standard for semantic modeling; standardized integration frameworks for interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
